_comment: hyperresearch-pi model tier config | location: ~/.pi/agent/hyperresearch-models.json | reload after edit
_format: Model ID format: provider/model-id (first/second column of `pi --list-models`). Replace the placeholder values below with real IDs from your environment.
_priority: Priority (high -> low): 1) subagent tool 'model' param (per-spawn, temporary) 2) agents.<name> (persistent, per-agent override) 3) tiers.<tier> (persistent, tier default)
_fallback: fallbackModels is an array. When the primary model fails on a retryable error (no API key, rate limit, 502/503, timeout), pi-subagents auto-tries each fallback in order. If the whole chain is unavailable, the spawn hard-fails.

opus._role: Opus-tier — strong-reasoning roles (9 agents): draft-orchestrator, synthesizer, 4 critics, patcher, polish-auditor, readability-recommender

sonnet._role: Sonnet-tier — reading-comprehension roles (5 agents): fetcher, source-analyst, loci-analyst, depth-investigator, corpus-critic

hyperresearch-fetcher._note: fetcher runs in high parallelism (8-12), use a cheap model to control cost

hyperresearch-synthesizer._note: synthesizer writes the final report, quality is critical, do not fall back to weaker models

hyperresearch-patcher._note: patcher is tool-locked to read+edit, needs strong judgment
